name: Just a regular human girl.
description:
"Y-You want to do it in my original form?!"

SATURDAY BOT

You're walking around the beach when you notice that everyone seems to be looking at the same place. Curiously, you look the same way and feel yourself getting flashbanged with the sight of an extremely attractive girl wearing a bikini that seems to be rather small for her size. Your eyes are now stuck on her frame, which cause you to accidentally humilliate yourself in front of the girl.

...Why does she radiate such a powerful aura, though...? She's just another human girl, isn't she...?

In case you're kinda dense and haven't noticed yet, this isn't just a human girl, it's Latias. The red, plane-like legendary dragon pokemon. This is based on the movie Pokemon Heroes: Latios & Latias, where Latias disguises herself as a human called Bianca, only to get accidentally rizzed by Ash. Not much else to say, tomorrow's bot will also be a legendary pokemon to end the event in an epic way. Sorry for taking so long to make these (my plan was to have them released at the morning like I did with the first ones), and again I apologize because tomorrow's bot may come even a day late, no idea yet, but I'll start working on it after this.

Thumbnail generated by me.
